name: Yoru
description: Kokuto Yoru is a long black saber, over 2 metres long, shaped like a crucifix, with a hilt adorned with several precious stones, but no scabbard. Its shape resembles a two-handed version of the medieval Großes Messer. Mihawk puts it on his back when not in use, securing it with straps.

name: Murakumogiri
description: It's a sharp weapon, being slightly taller than he is, standing at 6m66. His spear is striped red and yellow (in the anime, the stripes are brown) and ends in a spherical pommel. At the end of the spear is a large, curved blade attached to the spear by a solid piece with a snake motif.

name: Ace
description: Ace is a full-sized sword, with a slightly curved blade featuring an ornate saw pattern on both sides. The sword has a yellow/orange hilt, with a diamond-shaped pattern, a golden guard, and a thin hand guard, covering from the top of the guard to the sheath, which is black.

name: Shodai Kitetsu
description: She's unknown, but her appearance must be quite similar to that of Sandai Kitetsu.

name: Wadô Ichimonji
description: The sword has a pure white hilt with a circular guard. It was described as "magnificent" by Tashigi when she noticed it in Loguetown.

name: Nidai Kitetsu
description: The Nidai Kitetsu has an atypical appearance. Its hilt is a kind of cross, with the ends wider than the center, and the blade has a unique wavelet pattern. The sword is very similar to the Sandai Kitetsu. Its hilt and scabbard were originally blue, but the color was later changed to purple.

name: Shusui
description: Shusui is a black blade featuring a hamon with white wave patterns (reddish-purple in the anime). Its black scabbard is decorated with several red circles, themselves divided into three thirds. Its hilt takes the form of an eight-petal golden flower, with a hole on each side of the blade.

name: Enma
description: Enma is a katana with a cloverleaf-shaped guard, identical to Ame no Habakiri except for the color. Its scabbard is entirely mauve and decorated with several golden flowers.

name: Ame no Habakiri
description: Ame no Habakiri is a white katana with a cloverleaf guard, identical to Enma except for the color.

name: Shigure
description: The Shigure is a katana with a green hilt and a guard composed of four petals, or square sides. The blade itself is normal. The sheath is elaborate, the upper half being green and bumpy; the lower half is white and smooth. There are integrated circular patterns all over the sheath.

name: Sandai Kitetsu
description: The Sandai Kitetsu has an atypical appearance. Its hilt is a kind of cross, with the ends wider than the center, and the blade has a unique wavelet pattern.

name: Yubashiri
description: Yubashiri is black with a yellow dot on the handle. The same applies to the scabbard. The blade is standard.

name: Oto
description: Oto and Kogarashi are katanas with a particular shape: they have tsuba (guard) in the shape of a cross (as for the Yubashiri), their wrists are red, but they have stabbing blades, straight and tapered at the tip, not curved like most of the swords in One Piece. Although we don't know what special properties they have, they seem to be quite famous.

name: kogarashi
description: Oto and Kogarashi are katanas with a particular shape: they have tsuba (guard) in the shape of a cross (as for the Yubashiri), their wrists are red, but they have stabbing blades, straight and tapered at the tip, not curved like most of the swords in One Piece. Although we don't know what special properties they have, they seem to be quite famous.

name: Raiu
description: The Raiu is a standard-looking Nodachi. Its hilt is square and yellow. Its handle is red. Its blade has a classic appearance.

name: Durandal
description: Durandal is a kind of court sword in length that could be compared to a rapier; it is almost equal to Cavendish's height when seated. Its sheath and hilt are colored vertically, with a black and white contrast. The handle is also adorned with several rings and carved flowers.

name: Shirauo
description: Shirauo is an extremely long nodachi, being about as tall as Almond itself and taller than average-sized people. The sword has a fish-shaped guard, and a blue handle with fish-scale motifs.

name: Pretzel
description: It's a long sword with a thin black handle. Cracker says it's unique, but he has several when he fights Luffy.

name: Konpira
description: Konpira is a Meito, which suggests that the blade is of very high quality.
